name: nodo-burrito
description: NODO · Burrito Parrilla Mexicana — abastecimiento centralizado (bodega + sucursales): conteos, distribución, inventario. PWA.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck -w client && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.render-build: npm install && npm run build && npm run prisma:generate -w server && npx --workspace server prisma migrate deploy
